summary: Tested Buy X Get Y offers (Admin) and Daily Deal Requests (Seller) features. All 19 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tests passed for both admin create offer modal and seller daily deal request modal. Fixed a critical bug in FoodStoreDashboard.js where store.is_approved was accessed when store was null.

ui_bugs.issue: Login button click does not trigger form submission - only Enter key works

action_items: Investigate why login button click doesn't trigger form submission (Enter key works fine)
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: FoodStoreDashboard.js - Added null check for store before accessing store.is_approved to prevent runtime error
context_for_next_testing_agent: Buy X Get Y offers and Daily Deal Requests features are working correctly. Backend APIs all pass. Admin can create offers from Admin → Food Offers (عروض الفلاش) tab. Seller can request daily deals from their product list using the orange flame button. Login requires Enter key to submit (button click issue).

admin_create_buy_x_get_y_offer.details: Admin can create Buy X Get Y offers from the food offers tab. Modal shows offer type selection, quantity fields, and store selection.

seller_daily_deal_request.details: Seller can request daily deals from product list using flame button. Modal shows discount slider, price preview, and message field.

admin_view_deal_requests.details: Admin can view seller deal requests via API endpoint /api/daily-deals/requests
